channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Paul McCartney reflects on songwriting, The Beatles memories and collaborations with Ringo Starr and The Rolling Stones
item.description: Paul McCartney has spoken to NME about his enduring passion for songwriting and the deeply personal reflections behind his 19th solo album, ‘The Boys Of Dungeon Lane’. Recorded partly in Abbey Road St...

item.title: Punjab Cabinet approves plan to regularise 65,000 government workers, ending contractual employment
item.description: In a historic decision, the Punjab Cabinet, chaired by Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann, approved a comprehensive framework to end the long-standing contractual employment system and regularise more than ...

item.title: United Airlines flight diverted to Madison after passenger attempts to access cockpit
item.description: A United Airlines flight traveling from Chicago to Minneapolis was forced to divert to Madison, Wisconsin, after a disruptive passenger allegedly attempted multiple times to breach the cockpit, accord...

item.title: Kaye Abad opens up about how she told her mother about her breast cancer diagnosis
item.description: The article focuses on actress Kaye Abad and her personal experience of revealing to her mother that she had been diagnosed with breast cancer. According to the feature published by ABS-CBN Entertainm...

item.title: Luis Manzano reacts after Eric Fructuoso accepts 101-peso deal on Kapamilya Deal or No Deal
item.description: The latest episode of the popular game show Kapamilya Deal or No Deal featured a light but tense moment involving host Luis Manzano and contestant Eric Fructuoso after a surprising low-value deal. Dur...

item.title: Fatal Police Shooting and Stabbing Incident Under Investigation in Surrey, B.C.
item.description: A violent incident in Surrey, British Columbia, left one person dead and another injured on May 30, 2026, prompting investigations by both the province's police watchdog and the Integrated Homicide In...

item.title: Trump Defends NFL Rookie Jaxson Dart After Backlash Over Presidential Introduction
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump publicly defended New York Giants rookie quarterback Jaxson Dart following criticism over Dart’s recent participation in a political event. According to the report, ...

item.title: Joseph Nchimbi Shares Insider Accounts of the 2015 Magufuli Election Period
item.description: Former Tanzanian government official Joseph Nchimbi has spoken out about internal political happenings surrounding the 2015 general elections that brought the late President John Pombe Magufuli into p...

item.title: Trump Administration to Appeal Court Ruling on Tariff Refunds for Importers
item.description: The Trump administration is preparing to appeal a recent court decision that allows all importers who paid previously struck-down tariffs to seek refunds. The ruling has broad implications for interna...

item.title: ATDF-ASA challenges SAPS over use of force during N3 protest
item.description: The All Truck Drivers Forum and Allied South Africa (ATDF-ASA) has strongly criticised the South African Police Service (SAPS) following the arrest of their secretary general and two other individuals...

item.title: ABHA digital health ID system surpasses 90 crore registrations in India
item.description: India’s Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM) has achieved a significant milestone with more than 90 crore Ayushman Bharat Health Accounts (ABHAs) created across the country. The National Health Auth...

item.title: Liverpool sack Arne Slot, consider Andoni Iraola as new manager
item.description: Liverpool Football Club has officially decided to part ways with manager Arne Slot after a disappointing 2025/2026 season that failed to meet the club’s high expectations. The decision comes after wha...

item.title: Emilia Clarke denies earning $300,000 per episode for Game of Thrones and clarifies salary rumours
item.description: Emilia Clarke has addressed long-standing speculation about her earnings for her role in ‘Game of Thrones’, firmly denying rumours that she was paid $300,000 per episode during the show’s peak popular...

item.title: Stormers secure URC semi-final spot after 44–21 win over Cardiff in Cape Town
item.description: The Stormers have booked their place in the United Rugby Championship (URC) semi-finals after a hard-fought 44–21 victory over Cardiff in Cape Town. Although the final scoreline suggests a comfortable...

item.title: NDC Holds Special Convention in Abuja as Key Party Leaders Gather to Select 2027 Presidential Flagbearer
item.description: The Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) has held a special national convention in Abuja aimed at selecting and adopting its presidential candidate for the 2027 general elections. The event was led by th...

item.title: IPL 2026 Final: Gujarat Titans and Royal Challengers Bengaluru set for title clash in Ahmedabad
item.description: The IPL 2026 final is set to be played between Gujarat Titans (GT) and Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on Sunday, bringing together two contrasting yet succ...

item.title: Calvince Gaucho recounts a decade in crime, survival, and turning point leading to quitting in 2016
item.description: In an interview spotlight, Calvince Gaucho opens up about his past life in organised crime, revealing how his gang grew from 10 to 18 members and how only four survive to today. He describes daylight ...

item.title: B.C. Conservative Party to announce new leader following John Rustad’s removal
item.description: The British Columbia Conservative Party is set to announce a new leader following the removal of John Rustad, marking a significant turning point for the province’s Official Opposition. The leadership...

item.title: Trump criticizes judge over Kennedy Center renovation ruling
item.description: President Donald Trump posted a lengthy statement on social media Saturday criticizing a federal judge's ruling to halt renovations at the Kennedy Center and remove his name from the project. U.S. Dis...

item.title: Heifer Tanzania recognized for supporting women and youth development in the dairy sector in Tanzania
item.description: Heifer International Tanzania has received recognition for its continued efforts in empowering women and youth involved in dairy farming, particularly during the National Milk Week celebrations held i...
